prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约33283名→34599名→38794名→55382名→49311名。2021至2023年位次缓慢后移（累计约5500名），2024年出现大幅下滑至55382名（较2023年下降约16588名），2025年有所回升至49311名（较2024年前移约6071名）。近两年位次波动幅度较大，2025年基准位次约49311名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年238人→2022年249人→2023年226人→2024年263人→2025年304人→2026年341人。2025年较2024年扩招约15.6%，2026年较2025年继续扩招约12.2%，连续两年较大幅度扩招，招生名额增加显著，对报考竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年113名→2022年113名→2023年107名→2024年108名→2025年103名→2026年97名，排名稳步提升，已进入全国前100名，学校综合实力和认可度呈上升趋势；2022年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理方面的舆情（郑强书记管理受批评）；2026年声誉文件中未单独提及该校。抖音热度总排名第63位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约48.9万，主要曝光内容为CUBA篮球赛事和招生宣传，整体关注度中等。未见明显投档断档或录取异常记录；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上等级学科，与招生专业中的化学工程与工艺、化学工程与工艺（试验班）等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑作用。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 山东省2021–2026年考生总数持续增长：544424→594771→662199→666000→681127→720000（2026年），2026年较2025年增加约38873人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争。；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，在山东省属于跨省招生。该校在山东招生计划从2021年238人增至2026年341人，招生规模持续扩大，反映出对山东生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年招生计划继续扩招约12.2%、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%以及软科排名稳步提升等多重因素：扩招和考生增加对位次的影响方向相反（扩招缓解竞争、考生增加加剧竞争），但扩招幅度（12.2%）大于考生增幅（5.7%）；同时考虑软科排名进入前100名对报考吸引力的正面作用，以及声誉热度一般、优势学科单一等因素，在基准位次基础上小幅上调200名。预测2026年最低录取位次约53112名，区间52612–53612名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 33283 → 34599 → 38794 → 55382 → 49311. Rankings slowly moved backward from 2021 to 2023 (cumulative about 5500 places), dropped significantly in 2024 to 55382 (down about 16588 from 2023), and rebounded in 2025 to 49311 (up about 6071 from 2024). Rankings fluctuated considerably in the last two years, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 49311. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong for Comprehensive: 2021: 238 → 2022: 249 → 2023: 226 → 2024: 263 → 2025: 304 → 2026: 341. In 2025, enrollment expanded by about 15.6% compared to 2024, and in 2026, it continued to expand by about 12.2% compared to 2025. Two consecutive years of significant expansion, with a notable increase in admission slots, which alleviates competition for applicants.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising in recent years: 2021: 113th → 2022: 113th → 2023: 107th → 2024: 108th → 2025: 103rd → 2026: 97th. The ranking has steadily improved, entering the top 100 nationally, indicating an upward trend in overall strength and recognition. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly related to school management issues (criticism of Secretary Zheng Qiang's management). The 2026 reputation document did not mention the university separately. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranked 63rd, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 489,000. Main exposure content includes CUBA basketball events and enrollment promotion, with moderate overall attention. No obvious admission gaps or abnormal admission records were observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above level discipline at the university, directly corresponding to majors like Chemical Engineering and Technology and Chemical Engineering and Technology (Experimental Class) in the enrollment plan, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: From 2021 to 2026, the total number of examinees in Shandong Province has been continuously increasing: 544424 → 594771 → 662199 → 666000 → 681127 → 720000 (2026). In 2026, the number increased by about 38873 compared to 2025 (+5.7%), intensifying overall competition. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi Province, and recruits across provinces in Shandong. Its enrollment plan in Shandong increased from 238 in 2021 to 341 in 2026, with continuous expansion, reflecting the importance placed on Shandong students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the continued enrollment expansion of about 12.2% in 2026, the increase in Shandong examinees by about 5.7%, and the steady rise in Soft Science rankings: expansion and examinee increase have opposite effects on rankings (expansion alleviates competition, examinee increase intensifies it), but the expansion rate (12.2%) is greater than the examinee growth rate (5.7%). Also considering the positive effect of entering the top 100 in Soft Science rankings on application attractiveness, along with average reputation and popularity, and a single dominant discipline, the baseline ranking is adjusted upward by 200 places. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 53112, with a range of 52612–53612.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 53112, range 52612–53612. If your ranking is within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 52000), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 53500), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 and some Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Chemical Engineering and Technology (Experimental Class) corresponds to the university's only A- discipline, Chemical Engineering and Technology, which has a disciplinary advantage and deserves special attention.
